headline: JPMorgan Maintains Overweight Rating on McCormick (MKC)
summary: McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) is one of the 10 Undervalued Counter Cyclical Stocks to Buy Now. On June 12, 2026, JPMorgan lowered the firm’s price target on McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) to $63 from $64 and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares as part of a Q2 earnings preview. headline: Is Hormel Foods Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: Hormel Foods has lagged behind the Dow Jones over the past year, yet analysts remain unsure about the stock’s outlook.
